name: Visual Hero (TikTok/Reels Style)
description: Full-screen background image with a high-impact title and hook at the bottom. Perfect for mobile-first engagement.
brief: Mobile-first, high-impact background images for TikTok and Instagram Story.
ai_instructions: The title must be a 'pattern interrupt' hook. The BODY_TEXT must be ONE SENTENCE MAX. Focus on visually cinematic image prompts for placeholders like HOOK_IMAGE and BODY_IMAGE.
